title: let me stonk
description: poorly made stonking fix for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# let me stonk

a poorly done attempt at fixing stonking on modern versions for hypixel skyblock, for use alongside [NoFrills](https://modrinth.com/project/qpZgAErQ)'s `Stonk Fix` feature

### DISCLAIMER

while this mod is not a cheat in any way, it should be noted that it is under the category of `Use at your own risk` as per the hypixel rules, just like every other skyblock mod

## fixes

### added

- interacting with chests/heads/levers/whatever while stonking
- the game blinding you if you are at all inside a block

### will be added

- replicating 1.8 stair collisions
